zh.lifeSummary: 當Seth Pettypool於大約1701年出生在美國維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治時，他的父親William Pettipoole12歲，母親Frances Talley3歲。他於1720年與Martha Ragsdale在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1773年3月在美國維吉尼亞州哈利法可享年73歲，埋葬在美國肯塔基州特利格盧利安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seth Pettypool于大约1701年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州普林斯 喬治时，他的父亲William Pettipoole12岁，母亲Frances Talley3岁。他于1720年与Martha Ragsdale在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1773年3月在美国弗吉尼亚州哈利法可享年73岁，埋葬在美国肯塔基州特利格盧利安。

nameMeanings.name: Seth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (from a Hebrew word meaning ‘appointed, placed’), borne by the third son of Adam, who was born after the murder of Abel (Genesis 4:25, ‘And Adam knew his wife again; and she bare a son, and called his name Seth: For God, said she, hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel, whom Cain slew’). It is recorded in England from the 1400s and was popular among the Puritans (particularly for children born after the death of an elder sibling). By the 20th century it had become rare. It was used for the darkly passionate rural character Seth Starkadder in  Stella Gibbons's  satirical novel Cold Comfort Farm (  1932 ), and has recently enjoyed a revival .

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Seth Pettypool was born about 1701, in Prince George, Virginia, United States, his father, William Pettipoole, was 12 and his mother, Frances Talley, was 3. He married Martha Ragsdale in 1720, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died about March 1773, in Halifax, Virginia, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seth Pettypool est né environ 1701, à Prince George, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, William Pettipoole, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Frances Talley, avait 3 ans. Il a épousé Martha Ragsdale en 1720, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ mars 1773, à Halifax, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seth Pettypool um 1701 in Prince George, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pettipoole 12 und seine Mutter Frances Talley 3. Er hat 1720 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Martha Ragsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um März 1773 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Halifax, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seth Pettypool è nato il circa 1701 nel Prince George, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, William Pettipoole, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Frances Talley, aveva 3 anni. Lui sposato Martha Ragsdale nel 1720, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa marzo 1773, nel Halifax, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Seth Pettypoolが約1701年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州プリンス ジョーッジで生まれた時，父William Pettipooleは12歳，母Frances Talleyは3歳であった。1720年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でMartha Ragsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1773年3月にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハリファックスで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州トリググセルリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Seth Pettypool(이)가 대략 1701년 미국 버지니아 주 프린스 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pettipoole(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Talley(은)는 3세였다. 그는 1720년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Martha Ragsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1773년 3월 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 켄터키 주 트리그 세루리인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seth Pettypool nasceu aproximadamente 1701, em Prince George, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, William Pettipoole, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Frances Talley, tinha 3 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Ragsdale em 1720, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente março de 1773, em Halifax, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seth Pettypool родился около 1701 г. в местности принц джеордж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени William Pettipoole было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Talley, 3. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Ragsdale в 1720 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер около марта 1773 г. в местности хэлифакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности кирулян, триг, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seth Pettypool nació aproximadamente 1701, en Prince George, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, William Pettipoole, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Frances Talley, tenía 3 años. Se casó con Martha Ragsdale en 1720, en Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente marzo de 1773, en Halifax, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Cerulean, Trigg, Kentucky, Estados Unidos.
